name: FAXVIN
description: Free VIN decoder Tool: https://faxvin.com/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #855 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map FAXVIN output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
